news.t: Mailbag: A Follow-Up on Pfizer & Other Questions
Real Assets or Active ETFs? Where RIAs Allocate
Virtus Infrastructure Capital ETFs (AMZA/PFFA/PFFR) Declare Monthly Distributions
Preferred Shares Are Great for Income. Choosing Among Them Is Getting Harder.
Virtus InfraCap ETFs (AMZA/PFFA/PFFR) Declare Monthly Distributions
Virtus InfraCap U.S. Preferred Stock ETF (NYSE Arca: PFFA) Declares Monthly Distribution

overview.description: The Virtus InfraCap U.S. Preferred Stock ETF (PFFA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund of US preferred stock that leverages the portfolio to varying degrees. The fund seeks current income, with capital appreciation as a secondary goal. PFFA was launched on May 15, 2018 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.

data.title: Mailbag: A Follow-Up on Pfizer & Other Questions
data.text: Two weeks ago, I said that one of my favorite stocks right now is Pfizer (PFE). The pharmaceutical giant is in the middle of a transformational period with the goal to return to growth by 2029.

data.title: Real Assets or Active ETFs? Where RIAs Allocate
data.text: Registered investment advisors did not pull back on exchange-traded funds in the first quarter of 2026. They kept adding them, according to AdvizorPro's Q1 2026 Quarterly RIA ETF Trends Report.

data.title: Don't Overlook Preferred Stocks
data.text: If you ignore preferred stocks out of fear or unfamiliarity, get in there. The rewards trounce the risks.
